basic_info.title: Final Fantasy XV
basic_info.review: Final Fantasy XV is a visually stunning open-world RPG with innovative combat and memorable characters. The Windows Edition offers the best experience with enhanced graphics, all DLC included, and extensive mod support.

alternative_names: ファイナルファンタジーXV (Final Fantasy Jūgo)

serie.serie_name: Fabula Nova Crystallis: Final Fantasy XV

play_today.details: The Windows Edition includes all Royal Pack content, Season Pass DLC, and offers superior graphics with HDR support. Best version for modding and customization.

recommended_patches.name: Luminous Engine Tweaks
recommended_patches.description: Allows overriding engine settings for better graphics and performance optimization.

recommended_patches.name: Community Texture Patch
recommended_patches.description: Fixes numerous graphical errors left unpatched after FFXV's final update.

recommended_patches.name: FFXV Mini-Mod
recommended_patches.description: Performance optimization mod that fixes FPS drops when using summons and improves resource management.

recommended_patches.name: Pure Light Reshade Preset
recommended_patches.description: Makes the game look more cinematic with photorealistic feel and enhanced lighting.

play_today.details: Backward compatible version with enhanced performance and resolution. Digital Foundry confirmed this as an excellent console experience, though lacks mod support.
Original console release. Good experience but inferior to Windows Edition in terms of graphics and performance.

optimal_settings: Use Vulkan renderer for best compatibility

play_today.details: Original Xbox One version playable on newer consoles. Digital Foundry noted it performs well but lacks the enhancements of Windows Edition.
Pocket Edition is an abridged version with streamlined progression. Requires stable internet connection and offers less control over settings.

description.synopsis: Prince Noctis and his four friends embark on a road trip across Eos to reclaim his kingdom from the tyrannical Niflheim Empire, discovering friendship, sacrifice, and destiny along the way.
key_features: Real-time combat system with character switching
Regalia vehicle customization and driving mechanics
First-person view mode in Royal Edition
description.long_description: Final Fantasy XV, developed by Square Enix and directed by Hajime Tabata, represents a bold new direction for the Final Fantasy series. Originally announced as Versus XIII in 2006, the game underwent years of development before releasing on PS4 and Xbox One in November 2016. The Windows Edition (March 2018) brought all Royal Pack content including the Insomnia City Ruins dungeon, First-Person View mode, Armiger Unleashed combat state, and Regalia Type-D vehicle. Digital Foundry praised the PC version for offering superior graphics with HDR support and higher resolutions compared to console versions. The game features an innovative real-time combat system where players can switch between four party members mid-battle, each with unique abilities. The Luminous Engine delivers stunning visuals with dynamic weather systems and day-night cycles that affect gameplay.
legacy_and_impact: Introduced the Armiger combat system to Final Fantasy series
Pioneered seamless open-world exploration in a mainline FF title
Featured extensive modding support on PC platform
Part of the Fabula Nova Crystallis sub-series with shared mythology
Windows Edition set new standards for console-to-PC ports
